sql_array: CREATE TABLE h3_edges (index UInt64, edges Array(UInt64)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY index;
UPDATE h3_edges SET edges = h3GetUnidirectionalEdgesFromHexagon(1248204388774707199) WHERE index = 1248204388774707199;
SELECT index, edges FROM h3_edges WHERE index = 1248204388774707199;
SELECT h3GetUnidirectionalEdgesFromHexagon(index) AS edges FROM h3_edges WHERE index > 0;
